scheduleSubtitle: Design scheduled tasks, or start them whenever you need.
scheduleAwakeNotice: Scheduled tasks only run while this computer is awake.
scheduleTaskNameTooLong: Task name must be 50 characters or fewer.
scheduleTaskPromptPlaceholder: Describe what you want the agent to do...
scheduleTaskPromptTooLong: Task instruction must be 8000 characters or fewer.
scheduleManualHint: Manual tasks only run when you press Run once.
scheduleIntervalInvalid: Interval must be at least 1 minute.
scheduleAtTimePast: One-time enabled tasks must run in the future.
connectPhoneTitle: Use your phone to connect the local runtime
connectPhoneAutoBindHint: Confirm authorization on your phone and this will bind automatically.
connectPhoneProviderAlreadyConnected: {{provider}} is already connected. Each platform can only be connected once.
connectPhoneDisconnectConfirm: Disconnect "{{name}}" from this computer? You can scan again later.
connectPhoneDiscordScanHint: Scan or open the link to invite the bot, then choose the target channel.
connectPhoneDiscordMissingInvite: Paste a Client ID or Bot Token to generate the invite QR.
connectPhoneDiscordConfigureHint: Paste a Discord Client ID for the invite QR, then add the Bot Token to test and guard channels.
connectPhoneDiscordClientIdRequired: Paste a Discord Client ID first.
connectPhoneDiscordProxyHint: Used to detect the bot, read servers/channels, and send test messages. Leave empty for direct connection.
connectPhoneDiscordTokenReplacePlacehold: Paste again to replace the current Bot Token
connectPhoneDiscordTokenRequired: Paste a Discord Bot Token first.
connectPhoneDiscordUnavailable: Discord Bot bridge is unavailable. Try again inside the Electron app.
connectPhoneDiscordSelectChannelFirst: Choose a server and channel first.
connectPhoneDiscordTokenTitle: Bot Token is not encoded in the QR
connectPhoneDiscordTokenHint: The token is saved only in local main-process config and is used to connect Discord Gateway, send the test message, and watch the channel.
connectPhoneDiscordNoServers: Invite the bot, then refresh servers
connectPhoneDiscordStepInviteBot: Scan to invite bot to server
connectPhoneDiscordGuardConnected: Guard mode is enabled and Gateway is connected.
connectPhoneDiscordGuardConnecting: Guard mode is enabled and Discord Gateway is connecting.
connectPhoneDiscordGuardOff: Guard mode is off. It turns on after the test succeeds.
connectPhoneDiscordGuardConflict: This Bot is being guarded by another device.
connectPhoneDiscordConflictTitle: This Bot is being guarded by another device
connectPhoneDiscordConflictDesc: Owner installation: {{owner}}. You can manually take over from this computer.
connectPhoneDiscordLocalOnlineGuard: This channel is guarded only while this computer is online.
connectPhoneDiscordConfiguredFallback: {{count}} Discord channel(s) are configured in settings.
connectPhoneOfficialQrUnavailable: Desktop bridge is unavailable here. Generate this QR inside the Electron app.
connectPhoneWeixinBridgeMissing: WeChat login service is unavailable. Restart the app and try again; if it still fails, the app's built-in WeChat login component did not start successfully.
connectPhoneOfficialQrExpired: QR code expired. Generate a new one.
remoteChannelNoImSub: Add an IM connection and each one will map directly to a remote-channel conversation.
remoteChannelModelChangeUnsupported: Remote-channel model changes are not supported from IM commands. Change the model in GUI or runtime settings.
remoteChannelModeChangeUnsupported: Remote-channel mode changes are not supported from IM commands. Change the mode in GUI or runtime settings.
remoteChannelCommandUnsupported: This remote-channel command is not available from the local composer.
remoteChannelNoActiveIm: Add or select a remote-channel connection before sending a remote-channel message.
remoteChannelNewSessionStarted: Cleared the current remote-channel conversation for this connection.
remoteChannelHelpCommandNew: Clear the current conversation for the active remote-channel connection
pluginMcpTitle: Connect external tools to the agent
pluginSkillTitle: Make the agent work your way
pluginAlreadyAdded: This plugin has already been added.
pluginMcpRestartHint: After saving MCP config, a running local runtime may need a restart before the change fully applies.
pluginSkillRootMissing: The current Skill directory is unavailable. Choose a workspace or switch to a global directory.
pluginSkillScanUnavailable: Skill scanning is unavailable in this window.
pluginSkillScanPartial: Some skill folders could not be scanned.
pluginCustomMcpConfig: Or paste a complete MCP JSON config snippet
pluginCustomSkillFallbackBody: Describe this Skill's workflow, constraints, and expected output here.
pluginMcpFilesystemDesc: Let the agent read and write files in the selected workspace.
pluginMcpGuiScheduleDesc: Built-in MCP tools for listing, creating, updating, and deleting scheduled tasks.
pluginMcpPlaywrightDesc: Automate real browsers and inspect page state.
pluginMcpGithubDesc: Read repositories, issues, pull requests, and CI context.
pluginMcpContext7Desc: Fetch current library documentation for coding tasks.
pluginSkillReviewDesc: Review code changes for defects, regressions, and missing tests.
pluginSkillFrontendDesc: Improve UI details, responsive states, and visual consistency.
pluginSkillBugDesc: Reproduce and locate issues, then propose the smallest verified fix.
pluginSkillReleaseDesc: Draft user-facing release notes and upgrade notes.
composerHint: Press Enter to send · ⌘/Ctrl + Enter for a new line · AI-generated content, verify before use
composerShortcut: Enter to send, ⌘/Ctrl + Enter for newline
composerStartHint: Describe the task, paste code, or ask the agent to work directly in the current workspace.
composerContinueHint: The current context stays attached, so you can add constraints, corrections, or the next step.
composerOfflineHint: Reconnect the runtime before sending another message.
composerWorkspaceHint: Choose a working directory before starting or continuing a thread.
composerVoiceMaxDurationReached: Recording reached the time limit; transcribing now…
composerVoiceUnavailable: Set up Speech to Text in Settings before using voice input.
composerVoiceMicUnavailable: This environment cannot access a microphone.
composerVoiceRecorderUnavailable: This environment cannot record microphone audio.
composerVoiceMicDenied: Microphone access was denied. Allow it in system settings and try again.
composerVoiceTooShort: Recording was too short. Hold on a bit longer.
composerVoiceEmpty: The transcription came back empty. Try speaking a little closer to the microphone.
composerVoiceTimedOut: Voice transcription timed out while waiting for the provider: {{message}}
composerImageUnavailable: Image input is unavailable for this runtime.
composerWorkspaceFilePathRequired: Could not reference {{name}}. Pick a PDF inside the current workspace.
composerPdfImportFailed: Could not import {{name}} into the current workspace.
composerImageOnlyPrompt: Please respond to the attached image.
composerFileOnlyPrompt: Please use the referenced workspace file(s) as context.
composerFileAndImageOnlyPrompt: Please use the referenced workspace file(s) and attached image(s) as context.
composerWebUnavailable: Web tools are disabled or unavailable
composerSteerPlaceholder: Keep typing; sends inject into the current run…
composerQueuePlaceholder: Keep typing; sends wait and go out after the current reply finishes…
composerPlanPlaceholder: Break the goal down, outline steps, and scope changes before execution…
emptyHeroSub: Pick a task, or just type your question
emptyHeroSubNoWorkspace: Pick a local working directory first, then start your first thread.
usageHeatmapSub: Start from the work pattern you have already built. Each day is colored by {{runtime}} token usage, with turns, cost, threads, and cache detail available from the cells.
usageHeatmapEmptySub: Send your first {{runtime}} request and this calendar will start filling in.
usageHeatmapErrorSub: You can still start a new conversation from the prompts below.

usageHeatmapHeroSub.loading: {{runtime}} is checking recent activity. The starter prompts stay ready while the calendar warms up.
usageHeatmapHeroSub.empty: Once your first {{runtime}} turn completes, this space will turn into a daily usage calendar.
usageHeatmapHeroSub.error: Usage history is not available yet, but the workspace is ready for a new conversation.

usageHeatmapWarmupTitle.empty: No usage has been recorded yet

usageHeatmapWarmupSub.loading: This usually resolves quickly after {{runtime}} answers. You can still pick a prompt below.
usageHeatmapWarmupSub.empty: Send a request and finish a turn; the first active day will appear here automatically.
usageHeatmapWarmupSub.error: The usage endpoint did not respond, so the calendar is paused for now. New chats still work.

usageHeatmapCollapsedSub: The usage calendar is folded away for now. Expand it any time to check your recent agent rhythm.
usageHeatmapModelTooltip: {{label}} · {{total}} tokens total · {{input}} input · {{output}} output · {{cacheHit}} cache hit · {{cacheMiss}} cache miss · {{saved}} saved
usageHeatmapOverviewCaption: You've used {{tokens}} tokens across {{activeDays}} active days.
usageHeatmapOverviewCaptionPartial: Recorded {{tokens}} tokens across {{activeDays}} active days; some older turns were unmetered.
usageHeatmapOverviewCaptionUnrecorded: Token usage was not recorded across {{activeDays}} active days.
usageHeatmapModelsCaption: {{model}} accounts for {{tokens}} tokens in this range.
remoteChannelEmptyHeroNeedsInbound: Send the first message from the connected phone channel to establish the conversation, then continue locally. Otherwise local messages cannot sync back to the matching channel.
promptStructureSub: Get a quick map of folders and key files
promptStructurePrompt: Please explain this project's overall structure, key folders, and how the entry files relate to each other.
promptBugTitle: Help me find and fix a bug
promptBugSub: Analyze the cause and suggest a fix
promptBugPrompt: I have a bug. Please help me locate the root cause and propose a fix.
promptPlanSub: Turn the request into a step-by-step plan
promptPlanPrompt: Please break the following requirement into an implementation plan, including files to change and steps.
promptDesignPrompt: Please review the current UI, point out details to refine, and suggest improvements.
workspaceCardHint: Threads use this folder as workspace
queuedMessagesHint: These messages will send automatically after the current reply finishes.
queuedMessageSteer: Inject this queued message into the current run
runtimeOffline: SciForge Runtime is unavailable. Check settings or start the local runtime.
planModeActiveHint: Future messages will be sent in plan mode
slashCommandEmpty: No matching command. Keep typing to send the raw text instead.
slashCommandPlanDescription: Add a Plan marker to the composer before sending.
slashCommandAgentDescription: Turn off plan mode and go back to the default agent flow.
slashCommandGoalDescription: Set or manage the long-running goal for this thread.
slashCommandReviewDescription: Review current changes, a branch diff, a commit, or custom instructions.
slashCommandCompactDescription: Ask the runtime to summarize context for the active thread.
slashCommandForkDescription: Create a branch of the current conversation.
slashCommandArchiveDescription: Move the active thread out of the main list.
slashCommandRestoreDescription: Move this archived thread back to the active list.
slashCommandBtwDescription: Open a parallel side conversation that inherits this thread's context, without leaving the main chat.
slashCommandSteerDescription: Prefix a message with /steer to inject it into the active turn instead of queueing it.
slashSkillDescriptionFallback: Load this Skill for the next message.
sidePanelCloseTitle: Hide this side conversation and keep its thread hidden.
sidePanelPromoteTitle: Remove the side tag and surface this thread in the main list.
sidePanelEmpty: No side conversation yet. Use /btw to open one.
sidePanelDraftEmpty: Ask a temporary question. A side thread is created only after you send.
sideConversationNeedsActiveThread: Pick a thread before opening a side conversation.
evidenceDagUnavailable: Evidence DAG is unavailable in this build.
gitCheckpointUnavailable: Git checkpoints are not available for this runtime.
gitCheckpointNoThread: Select a thread to inspect its checkpoints.
gitCheckpointEmpty: No Git checkpoints are visible for this thread.
gitCheckpointForceRestoreWarning: Force restore may reset the current branch and discard uncommitted work after creating a rescue checkpoint.
gitCheckpointPreviewEmpty: This checkpoint has no patch preview.
gitCheckpointRestoreConfirm: Restore this checkpoint? The restore will stop if the working tree has changed.
gitCheckpointForceRestoreConfirm: Force restore this checkpoint? This may reset the current branch and discard uncommitted work after creating a rescue checkpoint.
editorOpenWorkspaceUnavailable: Choose a workspace before opening it in an editor
remoteChannelPlaceholder: Say something to {{name}}, or describe what you want help with…
remoteChannelComposerHint: Chat naturally, or ask it to introduce itself, polish a reply, or suggest the next step.
remoteChannelPlaceholderNeedsInbound: Send the first message from the connected phone channel, then come back here to continue…
remoteChannelComposerHintNeedsInbound: Start the first request from the connected phone channel first. After the conversation exists, local messages can continue and sync back there.
inspectorEmpty: No file changes in this thread yet.
inspectorSelectHint: Select a changed file to view its diff.
toolUploadWaitStatus: Waiting for model after {{count}} tool result(s)…
toolCatalogChangedStatus: Tool catalog changed; SciForge Runtime refreshed the active tool list.
toolStormSuppressedStatus: {{tool}} repeated the same call too many times; SciForge Runtime suppressed the duplicate and asked the model to change approach.
runtimeToolStormInterrupted: Runtime guard stopped this turn after repeated tool calls.
compactionSummaryFallbackStatus: Model compaction summary was unavailable; SciForge Runtime used the heuristic summary.
sessionHeaderHint: Start a thread from the left, or reconnect the runtime to continue working.
sessionUsageDetailsTitle: {{tokens}} tokens · {{cost}} · saved {{saved}} · cache {{cache}} · {{cached}} cached / {{miss}} miss · {{turns}} turns
busyTimeout: No response from the runtime after waiting {{minutes}} minutes. Deep-thinking tasks may take longer. If it stays stuck, you can cancel and retry.
runtimeActionNeedsConnection: Connect to the runtime first (see status bar).
runtimeFetchFailed: Could not reach SciForge Runtime. Make sure the local runtime is running, or enable auto-start in Settings.
runtimeBinaryNotInstalled: The SciForge Runtime CLI was not found. Run `npm install` in the SciForge folder to fetch it, or set the binary path in Settings.
runtimeMissingApiKey: The Model Router runtime key is missing. Open Settings and add it before the GUI can start SciForge Runtime.
runtimeProviderAuthBlocked: The upstream model provider rejected the request. Check the provider member API key, base URL, and model in Settings.
runtimeAutoStartDisabled: SciForge Runtime is offline. Enable automatic startup in Settings, or start the local runtime manually.
runtimeUnhealthy: The local runtime is currently unavailable. Check the port, token, or runtime status.
runtimeAuthRequired: The local runtime requires a bearer token for thread APIs. Add the runtime token in Settings, or restart the GUI so it can manage the local runtime again.
runtimePortConflict: The runtime port is already in use. Free that port, or choose another port in Settings.
runtimeActionFailed: Runtime action failed. Please try again.
runtimeSteerUnsupported: The current runtime does not support adding input while a turn is running.
runtimeUserInputUnsupported: The current runtime does not expose an HTTP submit endpoint for request_user_input yet.
workspaceRequiredToCreateThread: Choose a working directory before creating a thread.
workspacePickerUnavailable: The directory picker is unavailable here. Add the working directory path in Settings first.
workspacePickerNeedsRestart: The directory picker is not active in the current app process yet. Restart the GUI and try again.
preloadBridgeMissing: The app bridge is unavailable. Restart the app or check the preload configuration.
composerNeedsThread: Select or create a thread first…
composerStartsThread: Type and send to automatically create a thread…
composerMenuCreateImageDisabled: Enable the image model and add an API key in Settings first
gitCreateBranch: Create and switch to a new branch…
runtimeOfflineHeroTitle: SciForge is waking the local agent
runtimeOfflineHeroSub: The workbench is bringing the local runtime back into this window. When the local service is ready, sessions and the composer resume here.
runtimeErrorHeroTitle: Cannot connect to the local runtime
goalComposerPlaceholder: Type a goal for this thread
todoEmptyDescription: Plan checklists and model-written todos for this thread will appear here.
threadActionBusy: Wait for the current turn to finish before changing this thread.
runtimeFeatureUnsupported: The connected runtime does not support this action yet.
runtimeActiveTurn: A turn is already running in this thread.
sidebarOfflineHint: Connect the runtime first to create and continue threads.
sidebarEmptySub: Start your first task from the action above.
sidebarEmptySubOffline: Connect the runtime first, then create your first thread from above.
sidebarWorkspaceRemoveConfirm: Remove "{{path}}" from the project list? Existing threads will not be deleted.
sidebarThreadDeleteConfirm: Delete thread "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone.
sidebarChildrenNoThread: Open a thread to see child agents.
remoteGuardSubtitle: This entry represents a remote bot teammate. It can bind to a project or thread and keep work moving from your phone.
remoteGuardNewHint: Send /new remotely to start a new topic
remoteGuardCommandWhere: Show the project and thread currently being watched.
remoteGuardCommandNew: Start a new topic in the current project; the next message enters the new thread.
remoteGuardCommandAttach: Switch bot duty to the current desktop thread.
threadEmptySub: Ask the agent what to do next, or switch to plan mode before sending your first instruction.
browserAutoFollow: Follow local URLs from this thread
browserInvalidUrl: Enter a local or private-network HTTP(S) address.
writeRemoveWorkspaceConfirm: Remove "{{name}}" from writing spaces? Files on disk will not be deleted.
writeWorkspaceEmptySub: Create a Markdown draft and the writing tree will start here.
writeCreateFilePrompt: Enter a file name or relative path
writeCreateFolderPrompt: Enter a folder name or relative path
writeDeleteFileConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? This removes the file from disk.
writeDeleteFolderConfirm: Delete folder "{{name}}" and all of its contents? This removes files from disk.
writeReadOnlySaveDisabled: This file is read-only, so saving is disabled
planEmptySub: Create a plan from the composer or reopen a recent plan for this workspace.
planRefineHint: Want changes? Keep chatting on the left and the model will update this plan.
reviewPlanCardHint: Plan ready — review or edit it on the right.
reviewUnavailable: Code review is not available in this runtime.
planCreateFailed: Could not create the plan file.
planAgentStartFailed: Could not start the agent turn for this plan.
planExtractFailed: Could not find plan Markdown in the agent response.
planToolResultMissing: SciForge Runtime did not return a matching create_plan result for this plan.
planRequestRequired: Describe a request first, or use `/plan your request` to create a new plan.
sddEmptyDraftError: Add requirement details before creating a plan.
sddAssistantEmptySub: Ask AI to research, find missing questions, and shape the boundaries before moving into a plan.
sddAssistantClarifyPrompt: Read the current requirement draft, identify the key questions that still need clarification, and suggest concrete additions.
sddAssistantResearchPrompt: Based on the current requirement draft, do implementation-oriented research and summarize feasible approaches, risks, and details that need confirmation.
writeRichFallbackNotice: Rich editing is not safe for this Markdown file, so Source mode is active.
writePreviewErrorFallback: Markdown preview failed, showing source text instead.
writeUnsupportedFileType: Write currently opens only Markdown, TXT, PDF, and common image files.
writeImageOpenExternal: Open image in the system default app
writeImageRestartRequired: The image preview channel is not registered yet. Quit and restart SciForge, then try again.
writePdfSaveDisabled: PDF reading view cannot be saved
writePdfNoTextLayer: This PDF has no extractable text layer. Visual selection mode is available for image-region anchors.
writePdfAnnotationAskPrompt: Ask a question about this PDF selection.
writePdfAnnotationTranslatePrompt: Translate this PDF selection and explain any domain-specific terms.
writePdfAnnotationsDisplayHiddenTitle: Hide annotation highlights on the PDF page
writePdfAnnotationsDisplayCurrentTitle: Highlight only the hovered or selected annotation
writePdfAnnotationsDisplayAllTitle: Show all annotation highlights for review
writePdfAnnotationSidecarUnavailable: PDF annotations are not available for this document yet. Reload the annotations panel and try again.
writePdfAnnotationAnchorUnavailable: This PDF selection does not have a stable page anchor. Select the text again and retry.
writePdfAnnotationsExportPreviewContribu: The package includes the PDF, normalized anchors, sidecar metadata, and a reviewable contribution manifest.
writePdfAnnotationsContributionHint: Packages can be reviewed and merged by thread update time when shared with collaborators.
writePdfAnnotationExportUnavailable: PDF annotation export is unavailable in this runtime.
writePdfAnnotationExportFailed: Could not export PDF annotation package: {{message}}
writePdfAnnotationImportUnavailable: PDF annotation import is unavailable in this runtime.
writePdfAnnotationImportFingerprintMisma: {{file}} was created for a different PDF. Try anchor relocation for this document?
writePdfAnnotationImportFailed: Could not import PDF annotation package: {{message}}
writePdfAnnotationImportSuccess: PDF annotation package imported. Added {{added}}, updated {{updated}}, skipped {{skipped}}.
writePdfAnnotationReloadUnavailable: PDF annotation reload is unavailable in this runtime.
writePdfAnnotationReloadSuccess: PDF annotations reloaded. Added {{added}}, updated {{updated}}, skipped {{skipped}}.
writePdfAnnotationSaveAnswer: Save assistant answer as PDF annotation
writePdfAnnotationSavedAnswer: Saved assistant answer to {{count}} PDF annotation thread.
writePdfAnnotationSaveAnswerUnavailable: No matching PDF annotation thread is available for this answer.
writeLargeFileSafeMode: This file is large, so Markdown live rendering has been turned off to avoid a blank Write screen.
writeLargeFileSafeModeSub: You can still edit and save normally; the preview pane falls back to plain text.
writeLargeFileTruncated: This file is too large for Write to load fully right now. To avoid overwriting missing content, it has been opened read-only with Markdown rendering turned off.
writeChooseFileTitle: Open a file to start writing
writeChooseFileSub: Choose an existing document from the workspace, or create a new Markdown file.
writeEmptySub: Write mode keeps your files, preview, inline completion, and AI in one place.
writeStartTitle: Start from a calmer writing desk.
writeStartSub: Drafts, references, and the assistant all live in this writing space. Put down one Markdown file, then shape the title, sections, and citations from there.
writeStartAskAiPrompt: I want to start a new piece. Ask me 3 key questions first, then draft a Markdown outline I can keep expanding.
writeStartPreviewSub: The title, sections, and citations will unfold here.
writeCopyRichTextSuccess: Copied. Paste it into your editor, docs app, or chat tool.
writeCopyRichTextUnavailable: Rich text copy is not available in this build.
writeExportUnavailable: Document export is not available in this build.
writeAssistantEmptySub: It stays out of the way. Select text to quote it, or start with one of these writing actions.
writeAssistantSummarizePrompt: Please read the current writing file "{{file}}" and summarize its thesis, structure, and missing pieces.
writeAssistantOutlinePrompt: Based on the current writing goal and file "{{file}}", draft a clear Markdown outline that I can continue writing from.
writeAssistantPolishSelectionSub: Selected text will be quoted first
writeAssistantPolishSelectionPrompt: Please use the quoted selection to polish the expression, improve rhythm, and preserve the original meaning.
writeRuntimeUnavailable: The local runtime is temporarily unavailable. You can keep editing files in Write, but AI conversations, thread creation, and other runtime-backed features are paused for now.
writeInlineAgentPlaceholder: Tell AI what to do with this selection…
writeInlineEditUnavailable: In-place editing is not available in this build.
writeInlineEditNoSelection: Select text before applying an edit.
writeInlineEditMultiSelection: In-place editing currently supports one continuous selection.
writeInlineEditChanged: The selected text changed. Select it again and retry.
writeSelectionPromptPrefix: Please help continue, revise, or analyze the following selection.
imageCanvasReviewUnavailable: This image cannot be opened in canvas review. Check the workspace and image path.
canvasArtifactReviewUnavailable: This artifact cannot be opened in canvas review. Check the workspace and artifact path.
processFileReferenceHint: Click to preview, double-click to open in editor
threadForkBannerSub: Continues from {{title}}. Earlier messages are inherited; new turns stay in this branch.
threadForkBannerSubUnknown: Earlier messages are inherited; new turns stay in this branch.
rewindHint: Esc to cancel · ⌘/Ctrl + Enter to send
rewindBusyError: Wait for the current turn to finish before rewinding.
sddChangedBanner: Requirements {{ids}} changed after planning; the plan may be stale
sidebarFooterHint: Connect the local runtime to create threads and chat with the agent.
pluginExtensionPaperRadarDesc: Enable a local arXiv/bioRxiv radar panel for syncing metadata, ranking papers, and copying a daily digest.
pluginExtensionEnabled: Extension enabled. Paper Radar is now available from the workbench top bar.
paperRadarStaleService: Paper Radar is still running an older local service. Fully quit the app and run npm run dev again.
paperRadarTimeout: Sync took too long. Try again later, or reduce the lookback days.
paperRadarEmpty: Sync metadata or search papers to see results.
workflowSubtitle: Wire up a node-based flow: run it manually, fire it on a schedule / webhook, or let the code-mode agent call it. Each flow has an "Enabled" and an "AI-callable" switch below it.
workflowSidebarHint: Open a Create Loop to edit its nodes on the canvas.
workflowEmptyHint: Create one to chain AI tasks, conditions and HTTP calls.
workflowEnableHint: When on, this flow fires on its schedule / webhook / local API.
workflowCallableHint: Let the code-mode agent run it directly via run_workflow.
workflowCallableNeedsEnable: Enable the flow first before the agent can call it.
workflowPresetEmpty: Save any node as a preset to reuse it here.
workflowSaveAsPresetHint: Adds a reusable item under Custom with this node's current settings.
workflowTemplateHint: Renders a text string from the payload — reference the incoming text or json.field values. Fills the gap where Set fields only makes JSON.
workflowJsonStrict: Fail if the text isn't valid JSON
workflowJsonHint: Convert between the incoming text and structured JSON.
workflowOutputHint: Marks the Create Loop's final output — what run_workflow, the local /workflow/run API, and the run viewer return.
workflowLocalApiHint: Runs an enabled Create Loop synchronously over localhost and returns its output. Set a webhook secret in Settings to require authentication.
workflowModuleMissing: This module was deleted. Pick another module or remove this node.
workflowModuleNoFields: This module has no input fields.
workflowModulesPick: Select a module, or create one.
workflowModuleFieldsHint: Add fields to show a form on the node; read them in the script via $fields / $WORKFLOW_FIELDS.
workflowModuleCodeHint: Runs like the Code node. Field values are in $fields (JS) or $WORKFLOW_FIELDS (env), alongside $json / $text.
workflowNoSelection: Select a node to edit it.
workflowEmptyCanvas: Add a node from the left to get started.
workflowNoTrigger: Add a trigger node before running.
workflowApprovalHint: The run pauses here until you Approve/Reject it on the matching Create Loop card or in the run drawer. Note: the paused state is in-memory — an app restart loses the run.
workflowApprovalInstructionPlaceholder: Shown to the approver; may reference upstream variables.
workflowApprovalTimeoutHint: Auto-decide after this long; 0 waits indefinitely.
workflowApprovalResolveFailed: This approval request is no longer active. Refresh run status and try again.
workflowExtractSourceHint: Expression for the text to extract from; empty uses the upstream text. Supports json.field and $nodes.id.json.path references.
workflowExtractInstructionPlaceholder: Optional guidance for the model, e.g. amounts as numbers, dates as YYYY-MM-DD.
workflowClassifySourceHint: Expression for the text to classify; empty uses the upstream text.
workflowClassifyInstructionPlaceholder: Optional classification guidance, e.g. judge by user intent.
workflowTriggerWorkspaceHint: Default folder this Create Loop runs in (used by AI / image / code nodes). Empty uses the app workspace. Use {{json.field}} to pass it in as a run input.
workflowModelEmptyHint: If unset, uses the local runtime's current default model (the same one chat uses).
workflowNodeInputsHint: Upstream output is already passed to this node automatically. Only name a field here if you want to reference it precisely inside the prompt.
workflowInputRefPreview: Reference it in the prompt as:
workflowInputSchemaHint: Define typed inputs the caller provides — used by the Run form, the local /workflow/run API, and the agent's run_workflow. Each value lands on the run payload under its key.
workflowFallbackJsonHint: JSON used as this node's output after retries are exhausted.
workflowEnvVarsHint: Shared across this Create Loop; reference from any node with $env.key. Secret-typed values are redacted from run history.
workflowEnvEmpty: No variables yet. Add one to reference it from nodes via $env.key.
workflowRunLogEmpty: After a run, each node's input and output appears here in execution order.
workflowRunHistoryEmpty: No runs yet. Run once to inspect each node's inputs, outputs, and timing here.
workflowImportError_invalid-json: Import failed: not a valid JSON file.
workflowImportError_unsupported: Import failed: unrecognized Create Loop file format.
workflowImportError_empty: Import failed: the file has no nodes.
workflowTestMockHint: Used as this node's input payload. The Create Loop is saved first, then just this node runs.
workflowHooksHint: Bind a Create Loop to the code-mode agent's hooks for reactive automation (e.g. review-after-edit).
workflowHooksEmpty: No triggers yet. Add one to bind a loop to an agent hook phase.
workflowHookToolNamesHint: Fire only when the agent calls these tools; empty matches all. Common: write, edit, bash.
workflowHookModeHint_observe: Run the loop but don't change the agent's behavior or result.
workflowHookModeHint_block: Deny this tool call / turn if the loop fails or its output starts with deny/block/reject.
workflowHookModeHint_rewrite: Fold the loop output back: attach workflow_hook to the tool result, inject it as context, or rewrite arguments. The agent sees it next step.
workflowHookRecursionNote: Recursion guard: while a trigger's loop is running, tool calls it causes (incl. its AI nodes) won't re-fire hooks — so it can't loop forever.
workflowPromptPlaceholder: Describe what the agent should do. Use {{token}} for the previous step's output.
workflowPromptUpstreamHint: When you don't use {{ }}, upstream output is appended to the end of the prompt. Use {{ }} (e.g. {{text}}) to place it precisely.
workflowLlmModelPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the Model Router default alias
workflowModelNone: No models — type to use a custom one
workflowImagePromptPlaceholder: Describe the image. Use {{token}} for the previous step's output.
workflowImageHint: Pick a provider to use its image model, or leave it on default to use Settings. The image is saved to the folder above (default <workspace>/workflow-images) and its path becomes this node's output.
workflowArrayHint: Runs over the array in the previous step's JSON output (a single object counts as one item).
workflowFilterHint: Passes the data through only when the condition holds — otherwise this branch stops here.
workflowResearchQueryHint: Supports upstream variables; when empty, the node uses upstream text or JSON.
workflowResearchMaxResultsHint: Can also be overridden by a node input named maxResults.
workflowResearchSourcesHint: Leave all unchecked to use every currently enabled source.
workflowPaperDownloadOutputDirHint: Relative to the workflow workspace; paths outside the workspace are rejected.
workflowPaperDownloadMaxFilesHint: Downloads only accessible PDF URLs from upstream records; can also be overridden by a node input named maxFiles.
workflowCodeHintJs: Runs sandboxed in-process. Receives $json and $text; return a value.
workflowCodeHintCmd: Runs locally. Input arrives on stdin as JSON and via $WORKFLOW_JSON / $WORKFLOW_TEXT; whatever the script prints to stdout becomes the output (parsed as JSON when possible).
workflowLoopBody: Create Loop to run each iteration (the agent's job)
workflowLoopMode_foreach: For each (run once per array item)
workflowLoopArraySourceHint: Expression resolving to an array; empty uses the upstream payload json. Each item is available in the body as $loop.item / $loop.index.
workflowLoopContinueOnError: On item error, skip it and continue (recorded as error)
pluginMcpScientificSkillsDesc: Read-only local index, search, reading, and planning for installed K-Dense scientific skills.
pluginMcpScientificPlottingDesc: Generate scientific figures, apply paper-figure style, score similarity, and run one bounded auto-repair through a first-party controlled MCP.
pluginMcpImageGenerationDesc: Generate and edit visual image artifacts through a first-party MCP, then review them on SciForge Canvas without overwriting originals.
pluginMcpSciforgeCanvasDesc: Open a Cowart-compatible workspace canvas for reviewing scientific plot and ppt-master artifacts without overwriting originals.
pluginScientificSkillsUnavailable: Scientific skills status is unavailable in this window.
pluginScientificSkillsInstallSuggestion: Local K-Dense or curated plotting skills are missing. SciForge suggests installation but will not run it automatically.
pluginScientificSkillsInstallBody: SciForge will download the repository into this workspace and read-only index SKILL.md files; it will not execute third-party skill scripts or add them to always-on skill roots.
pluginScientificSkillsInstallBodyNpx: SciForge will run the external skills CLI and rescan local K-Dense directories; it will not execute third-party skill scripts or add them to always-on skill roots.
pluginScientificSkillsInstallPolicy: Version policy: first install uses main and records the actual commit and provenance. If the target exists but is invalid, it will not be overwritten.
pluginScientificSkillsInstallPolicyNpx: Compatibility policy: the npx backend follows the external skills CLI directory policy; SciForge only rescans afterward and shows the actual discovered path on success.
pluginScientificSkillsInstallUnavailable: Scientific Skills installer is unavailable in this window.
pluginMcpPptMasterDesc: Turn SciForge research context, drafts, quotes, and Model Router evidence into ppt-master presentation projects.
figureStyleSourceHint: Prepare a reference crop from a workspace image or PDF, then extract visual style.
figureStyleDropTitle: Choose or drop a reference figure
figureStyleDropHint: Supports workspace PNG, JPG, WEBP, BMP; PDF can be cropped into a reference first.
figureStyleNotesPlaceholder: Notes for provenance or style intent
figureStylePrepareUnavailable: Reference preparation is unavailable in this build.
figureStyleCropInvalid: Crop box is invalid. Use ratio values between 0 and 1.
figureStylePreparedPathOutsideWorkspace: Prepared reference is outside the current workspace.
figureStyleSourceRequired: Enter a reference image path first.
figureStyleWorkspaceRequired: Choose a workspace before extracting figure style.
figureStyleWorkspaceOnly: v1.3 only reads reference figures inside the current workspace. Move the image into the workspace or choose a workspace file.
figureStylePickUnavailable: File picking is unavailable in this build.
figureStyleDroppedPathUnavailable: Could not read the local path for the dropped file.
figureStyleUnsupportedReference: This reference format is not supported yet. Use PNG, JPG, WEBP, BMP, or PDF.
figureStyleUnsupportedOutput: This output format is not supported yet. Use PNG, JPG, WEBP, or BMP.
figureStyleUnavailable: Figure style extraction is unavailable in this build.
figureStyleEvaluateUnavailable: Figure style scoring is unavailable in this build.
figureStyleSaveUnavailable: Workspace saving is unavailable in this build.
figureStyleOutputRequired: Enter an output figure path first.
figureStyleEmpty: No style extracted yet. Use a cropped reference figure for the most reliable palette, axes, and spacing.
figureStyleScoreHint: After generating a figure, choose a workspace output image to score style similarity against the reference.
projectDagUnavailable: Project DAG is unavailable in this build.
projectDagDialogHint: State this project's goal once; every compiled conclusion is filed under it. Compile & export merges all threads' evidence into one project graph and opens the weekly report.
projectDagGoalTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Improve model accuracy on the X2 dataset
projectDagGoalDescriptionPlaceholder: What is this project trying to find out?
